Caption: 



----------
==howdy, itвЂ™s Barsee again.==

==happy wednesday, AI family, and welcome back to AI Valley.==

==**here are the biggest things worth knowing today:**==

* ChatGPT is about to sound a lot more human

* A developer gave ChatGPT a robot body

* Plus trending AI tools, posts, and resources

LetвЂ™s _dive_ into the Valley of AIвЂ¦


----------

----------
#### **WISPR FLOW**

## [Speak naturally. Send without fixing.](https://ref.wisprflow.ai/aivalley)

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/57738193-2774-4169-9924-ee62a48015d9/Newsletter_Hero_AndroidLaunch__9_.png?t=1781704434)
Follow image link: (https://ref.wisprflow.ai/aivalley)
Caption: Courtesy: Wispr Flow

Wispr Flow turns your voice into ready-to-send text in any app. Give coding agents 10x more context by speaking instead of typing. Works in Cursor, Claude, ChatGPT, and every IDE.

89% of messages sent with zero edits. Millions of users worldwide. Available on Mac, Windows, iPhone, and Android.

[Try Flow Free](https://ref.wisprflow.ai/aivalley)

~_*This is sponsored_~


----------

----------
#### **THROUGH THE VALLEY**

##### 1/ ChatGPT is about to sound a lot more human

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/10d60bb6-2da0-46d1-bc93-3a7e52db2a87/HK8qI4RbQAAQxSE__1_.png?t=1781704748)
Caption: 

OpenAI is preparing a major upgrade for ChatGPT Voice built around a new system called [GPT-Bidi](https://www.testingcatalog.com/openai-prepares-major-chatgpt-voice-upgrade-with-gpt-bidi-1/). Unlike today's voice assistants, the model can listen and speak at the same time, allowing ChatGPT to handle interruptions, change its response mid-sentence, and carry on conversations that feel much more natural. References to GPT-Bidi have already appeared across OpenAI's apps, alongside new High, Medium, and Instant intelligence modes that let users choose between deeper reasoning and faster responses.

OpenAI is also [expanding Codex](https://x.com/jxnlco/status/2066970432855581052) with tools that can control desktop apps, interact with websites, and automate workflows across browsers and operating systems. Together, the upgrades push ChatGPT closer to becoming an assistant that can both talk and take action.

**Why it matters:**

Current AI voice assistants still feel unnatural. They pause, wait for their turn to speak, and often struggle when users interrupt them. GPT-Bidi is designed to remove those friction points and make conversations feel more like talking to another person.

Combined with OpenAI's growing push into browser automation and computer control, ChatGPT is moving beyond answering questions and toward completing tasks on a user's behalf.

##### 2/ A developer gave ChatGPT a robot body

Youtube: I Gave ChatGPT a Body (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=S67z2aekBrI&utm_source=www.superpowerdaily.com&utm_medium=referral&utm_campaign=fix-this-code-the-three-words-that-led-the-u-s-government-to-ban-anthropic-s-fable-and-mythos)

A developer built a low-cost robot called [Growbot](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=S67z2aekBrI&utm_source=www.superpowerdaily.com&utm_medium=referral&utm_campaign=fix-this-code-the-three-words-that-led-the-u-s-government-to-ban-anthropic-s-fable-and-mythos) by connecting a ChatGPT-like AI model to cameras, sensors, motors, and memory systems. The robot could interpret sensor data, describe physical sensations, write code, perform movements, and even mimic emotions. Memory also allowed it to learn from previous interactions and improve over time.

Despite those capabilities, Growbot still struggled with fine motor control and predicting the physical outcome of its actions. The creator believes the missing piece is a "world model," something similar to the human cerebellum that continuously predicts and adjusts movement in real time.

**Why it matters:**

For years, many people assumed better robots would require dramatically smarter AI. Experiments like Growbot suggest the opposite may be true. Modern language models can already reason, plan, learn, and communicate surprisingly well.

The harder challenge is helping machines understand how the real world behaves. Grabbing a cup, opening a door, keeping balance, or predicting the result of a movement remains far more difficult than generating text. The next breakthroughs in robotics may come from solving those problems rather than building larger models.


----------

----------
# TRENDING TOOLS


--------------------
* [Trendos](http://trendos.com/ad-radar?utm_medium=influencers&utm_source=creators&utm_campaign=ai-valle) > 1,000+ brands are buying ads inside ChatGPT right now. Is your competitor one of them? ^~(sponsored)~^

* [Mercury Command](https://mercury.com/command) > A natural language banking agent that executes financial tasks with built-in approval workflows

* [Exa Agent](https://exa.ai/blog/exa-agent) > Conduct deep research, build targeted lists, enrich entities, and analyze companies through a single API with structured outputs

* [Okara](https://x.com/askOkara/status/2066899565484413070?s=20) > The world's first influencer agent

* [Origin](https://x.com/swyx/status/2066928345246470204) > Cursor's answer to Git, built to scale for AI-native development and agent workloads

* [Manus](https://x.com/ManusAI/status/2066899447225999515) > Users can now queue messages while long-running tasks are still in progress

* [Innflow](https://innflow.ai/) > Connect your favorite tools and deploy AI agents that automatically handle repetitive workflows.


----------

----------
# WHAT I'M CONSUMING


--------------------
* [Leaked financial docs](https://arstechnica.com/ai/2026/06/leaked-financial-docs-show-openai-is-losing-billions-of-dollars-a-year) show OpenAI isВ losing billions of dollars a year

* New OpenAI [Academy courses](https://openai.com/index/academy-courses-applying-ai-at-work) forВ the next era of work

newsletters.title: We Built Our Own Agent-native Tool. It Overhauled How We Build Software.
newsletters.content:
A solution for our chaotic Monday meetings changed what we ship customers В вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊ
https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiV2UgQnVpbHQgT3VyIE93biBBZ2VudC1uYXRpdmUgVG9vbC4gSXQgT3ZlcmhhdWxlZCBIb3cgV2UgQnVpbGQgU29mdHdhcmUuIiwicG9zdF9pZCI6NDMwMywicG9zdF90eXBlIjoicG9zdCIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vZXZlcnkudG8vIiwicG9zaXRpb24iOjB9


WE BUILT OUR OWN AGENT-NATIVE TOOL. IT OVERHAULED HOW WE BUILD SOFTWARE. https://every.


A SOLUTION FOR OUR CHAOTIC MONDAY MEETINGS CHANGED WHAT WE SHIP CUSTOMERS https://every.

by Stella Garber https://every.

Midjourney/Every illustration.

Stella Garber https://every. cofounded Hoop, an AI agent to help subcriber brands cut churn, after years at Trello watching what makes software stick. When her teamвЂ™s customer discovery calls became a mess of scattered notes and competing interpretations, they built an internal AI analysis tool from scratch using EveryвЂ™s agent-native architecture https://every. philosophy. It reshaped how they build their actual product. Plus: While youвЂ™re waiting for Fable 5 to return, weвЂ™ve compiled 13 copy-ready prompts https://every. based on the Every teamвЂ™s workflows. Use them to plan, build, research, verify, and hand off complex work that runs for hours.вЂ”Kate Lee https://every.

Get the Fable prompts https://every.



----------------------------------------



It was Monday morning, and my cofounder Brian was reading from our agentвЂ™s weekly analysis of customer discovery calls. вЂњSubscription retention,вЂќ he said. вЂњFive separate brands mentioned it as their top priority, and none of them trust existing AI tools to touch it.вЂќ

Just weeks ago, unearthing an insight like this wouldвЂ™ve been nearly impossible.

At my pre-product-market fit startup, weвЂ™d all been speaking with prospects and trying to figure out the positioning for our product, but keeping track of everything we learned was a mess across founders, platforms, and mediums. To share what we learned during our Monday meeting, Brian would read notes in Slack, collect transcripts from Granola, and try to make sense of it all in Claude Code.

We couldnвЂ™t afford to be that disorganized. WeвЂ™d recently launched Hoop https://every., an agent that helps subscription brands reduce churn, and we needed to learn as quickly as we could. So we had to talk to as many potential customers as possible, then rigorously document and score each call to separate polite interest from genuine demand. Everyone on our five-person team was putting in the effort, but each of us had our own process, our own tools, and our own interpretation of what happened on each customer call.

So my two cofounders and IвЂ”none of us with вЂњengineerвЂќ in our titleвЂ”built an internal tool to fix it. What we didnвЂ™t expect was that the tool would change how we built our actual product for customers, too.

https://every.




THROW OUT THE OLD PLAYBOOK

The software development lifecycle wasnвЂ™t designed for agentic AIвЂ”and it shows. Tools, decisions, and the relationship with code itself are shifting faster than any playbook accounts for.

Meet Command Line https://every., MicrosoftвЂ™s new blog straight from their technical teams, sharing what theyвЂ™re building, how theyвЂ™re operating, and what theyвЂ™re learning along the way. From articles like why the industry keeps confusing AI capability with AI reality to how theyвЂ™re designing agent-first devices from scratch, Command Line is written by builders, for builders.

Read now https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiV2UgQnVpbHQgT3VyIE93biBBZ2VudC1uYXRpdmUgVG9vbC4gSXQgT3ZlcmhhdWxlZCBIb3c

----------
==howdy, itвЂ™s Barsee again.==

==happy tuesday, AI family, and welcome back to AI Valley.==

==**here are the biggest things worth knowing today:**==

* Claude Fable 5 was switched off by the US government

* SpaceX acquires AI coding startup Cursor for $60 billion

* Plus trending AI tools, posts, and resources

LetвЂ™s _dive_ into the Valley of AIвЂ¦


----------

----------
#### **ADOBE**

##### Creative AI is doing more than changing how creators work.В ItвЂ™sВ also shaping how they think about whatвЂ™s possible

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/3a4935b0-f1ad-44bb-919d-57ff7240c8e7/Screenshot_2026-06-16_at_10.11.48_AM__1_.png?t=1781620024)
Follow image link: (https://news.adobe.com/news/2026/06/creators-toolkit-report-2026)
Caption: Courtesy: Adobe

According toВ AdobeвЂ™sВ latestВ CreatorsвЂ™В ToolkitВ Report,В nearly halfВ (48%)В of creators say that creativeВ AI makes them feel more secure about their future as creators.В In addition,В 40%В say that AI-assisted contentВ consistently performs better.В В Learn more onВ [AdobeвЂ™s newsroom.](https://news.adobe.com/news/2026/06/creators-toolkit-report-2026)

~_*This is sponsored_~


----------

----------
#### **THROUGH THE VALLEY**

##### 1/ Claude Fable 5 was switched off by the US government

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/a2eecd65-1474-4ae0-baf7-e848a3184074/Anthropic-Says-US-Gov-Ordered-it-to-Shut-Down-Mythos-Models-Business-2280583841__1_.png?t=1781622310)
Caption: 

More than 100 cybersecurity executives and researchers have [signed](https://freefable.org/) an open letter urging the U.S. government to lift restrictions on Anthropic's Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5 models. The move comes just days after Anthropic launched Fable 5, its new Mythos-class model designed for general use. On June 12, the company abruptly disabled both models after receiving a government directive restricting access for foreign nationals, including international customers, researchers, and even some Anthropic employees.

The [restrictions](https://www.anthropic.com/news/fable-mythos-access) followed concerns that a jailbreak could allow the models to identify software vulnerabilities and bypass some cybersecurity safeguards. The government order reportedly restricted access for foreign nationals, including international customers, researchers, and even some Anthropic employees. Unable to enforce those restrictions cleanly, Anthropic shut the models off entirely.

**Why it matters:**

Fable 5 went from one of the most anticipated AI launches of the year to being unavailable worldwide in less than three days. That's a level of government intervention the AI industry has rarely seen.

The dispute could shape how future frontier models are released. If advanced AI systems can face restrictions after launch, companies may need to spend as much time working with regulators and national security agencies as they do building the technology itself.

##### 2/ SpaceX acquires AI coding startup Cursor for $60 billion

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/1c2ee5c6-b667-425a-9f4a-ceb335fbd15d/675664_624347_5551__1_.png?t=1781621236)
Caption: 

SpaceX has agreed to [acquire](https://x.com/BullTheoryio/status/2066836174249852977?s=20) AI coding startup Cursor in a $60 billion stock deal, just days after its blockbuster IPO. Cursor has become one of the fastest-growing software companies in history, with millions of developers using its AI-powered coding tools to write, edit, and manage software. Before the deal, the company was reportedly raising funding at a $50 billion valuation and had attracted backing from Andreessen Horowitz, Thrive Capital, and Nvidia.

**Why it matters:**

SpaceX has told investors that AI could become one of its biggest businesses in the future, with the company estimating a $26 trillion opportunity across AI infrastructure and software. Cursor gives SpaceX a product already used by developers around the world and a direct foothold in one of the fastest-growing parts of the AI market.


--------------------

newsletters.content:
Plus: Everything we published about Anthropic's new model В вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊ
https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiRmFibGUsIERpc2FibGVkIiwicG9zdF9pZCI6NDMwMSwicG9zdF90eXBlIjoicG9zdCIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vZXZlcnkudG8vIiwicG9zaXRpb24iOjB9

Context Window

https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiRmFibGUsIERpc2FibGVkIiwicG9zdF9pZCI6NDMwMSwicG9zdF90eXBlIjoicG9zdCIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vZXZlcnkudG8vY29udGV4dC13aW5kb3ciLCJwb3NpdGlvbiI6MX0=


FABLE, DISABLED https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiRmFibGUsIERpc2FibGVkIiwicG9zdF9pZCI6NDMwMSwicG9zdF90eXBlIjoicG9zdCIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vZXZlcnkudG8vY29udGV4dC13aW5kb3cvZmFibGUtZGlzYWJsZWQiLCJwb3NpdGlvbiI6Mn0=


PLUS: EVERYTHING WE PUBLISHED ABOUT ANTHROPIC'S NEW MODEL https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiRmFibGUsIERpc2FibGVkIiwicG9zdF9pZCI6NDMwMSwicG9zdF90eXBlIjoicG9zdCIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vZXZlcnkudG8vY29udGV4dC13aW5kb3cvZmFibGUtZGlzYWJsZWQiLCJwb3NpdGlvbiI6M30=

by Every Staff https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiRmFibGUsIERpc2FibGVkIiwicG9zdF9pZCI6NDMwMSwicG9zdF90eXBlIjoicG9zdCIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vZXZlcnkudG8vQEV2ZXJ5JTIwU3RhZmYiLCJwb3NpdGlvbiI6NH0=

Midjourney/Every illustration.

On Friday night, the U.S. government banned AnthropicвЂ™s distribution of Fable 5 and Mythos 5 to non-U.S. nationals. In response, Anthropic disabled Fable for all customers. As of this writing, the situation is ongoing.

It remains to be seen how it will play out, but I can already see the difference in my AI usage. HereвЂ™s a graph comparing my Claude and Codex usage before and after the ban (the вЂњeventвЂќ below):

https://every. courtesy of Dan Shipper.




Before the ban, I was split about evenly between Claude and Codex. After (and after a period where I was using neither because I was sleeping), I switched almost entirely to Codex.

My guess is that this ban is not going to last very long. It seems to rest on a misunderstanding between the government and Anthropic https://every. about which kinds of guardrail bypasses are fixable and what counts as an adequate solution. Anthropic believes the jailbreak identified by the government is narrow rather than universalвЂ”it surfaces only minor vulnerabilities that other public models are already susceptible to. The government apparently believes otherwise. Because both sides are highly incentivized to work this out, IвЂ™d bet that the ban is revoked after a few daysвЂ”and demand for the newly returned Fable skyrockets.

However, this kind of move is extremely disruptive and distracting for people working at Anthropic. The only comparable scenario I can remember is Sam Altman https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiRmFibGUsIERpc2FibGVkIiwicG9zdF9pZCI6NDMwMSwicG9zdF90eXBlIjoicG9zdCIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vZXZlcnkudG8vZXZlcnl0aGluZy90aGlua3NnaXZpbmctaXMtdXBvbi11cyIsInBvc2l0aW9uIjo3fQ==вЂ™s firing https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiRmFibGUsIERpc2FibGVkIiwicG9zdF9pZCI6NDMwMSwicG9zdF90eXBlIjoicG9zdCIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vZXZlcnkudG8vZXZlcnl0aGluZy90aGlua3NnaXZpbmctaXMtdXBvbi11cyIsInBvc2l0aW9uIjo4fQ==, which was resolved relatively quickly. Even though Altman was reinstated, I do think the chaos disrupted the companyвЂ™s momentum for months afterward.

WeвЂ™ll keep a close eye on whether the same is true here.вЂ”Dan Shipper https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiRmFibGUsIERpc2FibGVkIiwicG9zdF9pZCI6NDMwMSwicG9zdF90eXBlIjoicG9zdCIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vZXZlcnkudG8vQGRhbnNoaXBwZXIiLCJwb3NpdGlvbiI6OX0=

Was this newsletter forwarded to you? Sign up https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiRmFibGUsIERpc2FibGVkIiwicG9zdF9pZCI6NDMwMSwicG9zdF90eXBlIjoicG9zdCIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vZXZlcnkudG8vYWNjb3VudCIsInBvc2l0aW9uIjoxMH0= to get it in your inbox.

----------------------------------------


KNOWLEDGE BASE

вЂњVibe Check: Fable 5 Is the Best Coding Model in the WorldвЂќ https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiRmFibGUsIERpc2FibGVkIiwicG9zdF9pZCI6NDMwMSwicG9zdF90eXBlIjoicG9zdCIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vZXZlcnkudG8vdmliZS1jaGVjay9hbnRocm9waWMtbXl0aG9zLW91ci1mYWJsZS12aWJlLWNoZWNrIiwicG9zaXRpb24iOjExfQ== by Dan Shipper https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiRmFibGUsIERpc2FibGVkIiwicG9zdF9pZCI6NDMwMSwicG9zdF90eXBlIjoicG9zdCIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vZXZlcnkudG8vQGRhbnNoaXBwZXIiLCJwb3NpdGlvbiI6MTJ9 and Katie Parrott https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiRmFibGUsIERpc2FibGVkIiwicG9zdF9pZCI6NDMwMSwicG9zdF90eXBlIjoicG9zdCIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vZXZlcnkudG8vQGthdGllLnBhcnJvdHQxMiIsInBvc2l0aW9uIjoxM30=/Vibe Check https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiRmFibGUsIERpc2FibGVkIiwicG9zdF9pZCI6NDMwMSwicG9zdF90eXBlIjoicG9zdCIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vZXZlcnkudG8vdmliZS1jaGVjayIsInBvc2l0aW9uIjoxNH0=: AnthropicвЂ™s Fable 5, the first model in its Mythos class, tops every model Every has tested on coding. ItвЂ™s also overpowered, and overpriced, for most everyday work. Dan and Katie Parrott https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiRmFibGUsIERpc2FibGVkIiwicG9zdF9pZCI6NDMwMSwicG9zdF90eXBlIjoicG9zdCIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vZXZlcnkudG8vQGthdGllLnBhcnJvdHQxMiIsInBvc2l0aW9uIjoxNX0= ran it through EveryвЂ™s standard evaluations and landed on one rule: Reach for it on long, complex, minimally supervised tasks, and stay with GPT-5.5 or Opus 4.8 for the rest. Read this for the head-to-head verdict and when Fable 5 is worth the cost.

вЂњHow to Get the Most Out of Fable 5вЂќ https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiRmFibGUsIERpc2FibGVkIiwicG9zdF9pZCI6NDMwMSwicG9zdF90eXBlIjoicG9zdCIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vZXZlcnkudG8vY29udGV4dC13aW5kb3cvaG93LXRvLWdldC10aGUtbW9zdC1vdXQtb2YtZmFibGUtNSIsInBvc2l0aW9uIjoxNn0= by Laura Entis https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiRmFibGUsIERpc2FibGVkIiwicG9zdF9pZCI6NDMwMSwicG9zdF90eXBlIjoicG9zdCIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8v

newsletters.title: The Moral of Fable
newsletters.content:
What the most powerful model yet teaches us about the future of knowledge work В вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊВ вЂЊ

THE MORAL OF FABLE https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiVGhlIE1vcmFsIG9mIEZhYmxlIiwicG9zdF9pZCI6NDMwMCwicG9zdF90eXBlIjoicG9zdCIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vZXZlcnkudG8vY2hhaW4tb2YtdGhvdWdodC90aGUtbW9yYWwtb2YtZmFibGU_bWV0ZXJlZF9wYXl3YWxsPTEiLCJwb3NpdGlvbiI6Mn0=


WHAT THE MOST POWERFUL MODEL YET TEACHES US ABOUT THE FUTURE OF KNOWLEDGE WORK https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiVGhlIE1vcmFsIG9mIEZhYmxlIiwicG9zdF9pZCI6NDMwMCwicG9zdF90eXBlIjoicG9zdCIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vZXZlcnkudG8vY2hhaW4tb2YtdGhvdWdodC90aGUtbW9yYWwtb2YtZmFibGU_bWV0ZXJlZF9wYXl3YWxsPTEiLCJwb3NpdGlvbiI6M30=

by Dan Shipper https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiVGhlIE1vcmFsIG9mIEZhYmxlIiwicG9zdF9pZCI6NDMwMCwicG9zdF90eXBlIjoicG9zdCIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vZXZlcnkudG8vY2hhaW4tb2YtdGhvdWdodC90aGUtbW9yYWwtb2YtZmFibGU_bWV0ZXJlZF9wYXl3YWxsPTEiLCJwb3NpdGlvbiI6NH0=

Midjourney/Every illustration.

Was this newsletter forwarded to you? Sign up https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiVGhlIE1vcmFsIG9mIEZhYmxlIiwicG9zdF9pZCI6NDMwMCwicG9zdF90eXBlIjoicG9zdCIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vZXZlcnkudG8vYWNjb3VudCIsInBvc2l0aW9uIjo1fQ== to get it in your inbox.



----------------------------------------



As any child whoвЂ™s heard Aesop knows, the point of a fable is its moral. We see the consequences of falsely crying wolf. We learn why slow and steady wins the hare race.

So what is the moral of Claude Fable 5, AnthropicвЂ™s newest model, which this week we called the best coding model in the world https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiVGhlIE1vcmFsIG9mIEZhYmxlIiwicG9zdF9pZCI6NDMwMCwicG9zdF90eXBlIjoicG9zdCIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vZXZlcnkudG8vdmliZS1jaGVjay9hbnRocm9waWMtbXl0aG9zLW91ci1mYWJsZS12aWJlLWNoZWNrIiwicG9zaXRpb24iOjZ9?

For engineers, the case is easy to make. For many knowledge workers, though, Fable might feel incremental. You may have one-shotted an impressive demo or two, but youвЂ™re probably not using it for your day-to-day work. Why would you? It costs twice as much and the results arenвЂ™t that much better.

But there is a certain class of developers who are feeling FableвЂ™s full force. These are people like Cora https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiVGhlIE1vcmFsIG9mIEZhYmxlIiwicG9zdF9pZCI6NDMwMCwicG9zdF90eXBlIjoicG9zdCIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vY29yYS5jb21wdXRlciIsInBvc2l0aW9uIjo3fQ== general manager Kieran Klaassen https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiVGhlIE1vcmFsIG9mIEZhYmxlIiwicG9zdF9pZCI6NDMwMCwicG9zdF90eXBlIjoicG9zdCIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vZXZlcnkudG8vQGtpZXJhbl8xMzU1IiwicG9zaXRpb24iOjh9, who are suddenly churning through his backlog of bug fixes and feature requests in hours instead of days. вЂњThis is my favorite model ever,вЂќ he told me.

WhatвЂ™s the difference between Kieran and everyone else? The difference between Kieran and most people using Fable isnвЂ™t simply that heвЂ™s a developer but that heвЂ™s at Level 7 or 8 on our scale of AI use https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiVGhlIE1vcmFsIG9mIEZhYmxlIiwicG9zdF9pZCI6NDMwMCwicG9zdF90eXBlIjoicG9zdCIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vZXZlcnkudG8vZ3VpZGVzL3RoZS1laWdodC1sZXZlbHMtb2YtYWktYWRvcHRpb24iLCJwb3NpdGlvbiI6OX0=: He delegates whole projects, lets agents work asynchronously, reviews the results, and feeds what he learns into the next run. In other words he writesвЂ”dare I say it, loops https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiVGhlIE1vcmFsIG9mIEZhYmxlIiwicG9zdF9pZCI6NDMwMCwicG9zdF90eXBlIjoicG9zdCIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8veC5jb20vc3RlaXBldGUvc3RhdHVzLzIwNjM2OTcxNjI3NDgyNjA2MjciLCJwb3NpdGlvbiI6MTB9вЂ”not prompts.

For now, this might make Fable seem like a tool for developers. But in AI, developer workflows have a habit https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiVGhlIE1vcmFsIG9mIEZhYmxlIiwicG9zdF9pZCI6NDMwMCwicG9zdF90eXBlIjoicG9zdCIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vZXZlcnkudG8vY29udGV4dC13aW5kb3cvb25lLWFwcC10by1ydWxlLWFsbC1rbm93bGVkZ2Utd29yayIsInBvc2l0aW9uIjoxMX0= of spreading to the rest of knowledge work. Claude Code started as a developer tool, and now the same methodology is being used for everything from slide decks to spreadsheets https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiVGhlIE1vcmFsIG9mIEZhYmxlIiwicG9zdF9pZCI6NDMwMCwicG9zdF90eXBlIjoicG9zdCIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vZXZlcnkudG8vYWxzby10cnVlLWZvci1odW1hbnMveW91LWFyZS10aGUtbW9zdC1leHBlbnNpdmUtbW9kZWwiLCJwb3NpdGlvbiI6MTJ9 inside of Cowork and Codex.

https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiVGhlIE1vcmFsIG9mIEZhYmxlIiwicG9zdF9pZCI6NDMwMCwicG9zdF90eXBlIjoicG9zdCIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vYi5saW5rL2V2ZXJ5LW4zIiwicG9zaXRpb24iOjEzLCJhZHZlcnRpc2VtZW50X2lkIjoxMTgxfQ==

Cost-per-database pricing limits your creativity. You have a single instance, change things carefully, and are limited to one or two experiments. But Ghost is different. ItвЂ™s Postgres designed for agents that need unlimited databases on demand. Spin up 20 copies for testing, fork for each experiment, and delete what fails. Your agent handles everything: authentication, introspection, and queries, via native MCP integration. Built specifically for Claude Code and agentic workflows. Free tier: unlimited databases, 1TB storage.

Get started https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiVGhlIE1vcmFsIG9mIEZhYmxlIiwicG9zdF9pZCI6NDMwMCwicG9zdF90eXBlIjoicG9zdCIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vYi5saW5rL2V2ZXJ5LW4zP3NvdXJjZT1wb3N0X2J1dHRvbiIsInBvc2l0aW9uIjoxNCwiYWR2ZXJ0aXNlbWVudF9pZCI6MTE4MX0=
Want to sponsor Every? Click here https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiVGhlIE1vcmFsIG9mIEZhYmxlIiwicG9zdF9pZCI6NDMwMCwicG9zdF90eXBlIjoicG9zdCIsInVybCI6Im1haWx0bzpzcG9uc29yc2hpcHNAZXZlcnkudG8iLCJwb3NpdGlvbiI6MTV9.

If youвЂ™re not feeling FableвЂ™s force, thatвЂ™s probably because you havenвЂ™t yet started to treat your work like gardening ...



----------------------------------------



Become a paid subscriber to Every https://every.to/emails/click/1eb47536f45a3508ca723b5b2cb780e942839f966e324ef3162cd49469aec49f/eyJzdWJqZWN0IjoiVGhlIE1vcmFsIG9mIEZhYmxlIiwicG9zdF9pZCI6NDMwMCwicG9zdF90eXBlIjoicG9zdCIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vZXZlcnkudG8vc3Vic

newsletters.title: RSVP: Push Fable and Codex to the max
newsletters.content:
вЂ‹

( https://0ab9ee3d.click.kit-mail3.com/0vu5mv645et9h96eepqflhv7ooo9wcnh5ngmn/dpheh0hegp0le8hmh4/aHR0cHM6Ly9ldmVyeS50bw== )

Hi there,

AnthropicвЂ™s Fable 5 can вЂ‹finish projects that once took days or weeks ( https://0ab9ee3d.click.kit-mail3.com/0vu5mv645et9h96eepqflhv7ooo9wcnh5ngmn/e0hph7h7gr0874i8h2/aHR0cHM6Ly9ldmVyeS50by92aWJlLWNoZWNrL2FudGhyb3BpYy1teXRob3Mtb3VyLWZhYmxlLXZpYmUtY2hlY2s= )вЂ‹. ItвЂ™s also slow and expensive for everyday work. So which jobs are worth it?

This Friday, the Every team is holding a live two-hour camp to answer that question with the actual projects weвЂ™ve built with the best coding model in the world.

вЂ‹Fable 5 Power User Camp ( https://0ab9ee3d.click.kit-mail3.com/0vu5mv645et9h96eepqflhv7ooo9wcnh5ngmn/7qh7h8h97nor93hzh6/aHR0cHM6Ly9ldmVyeS50by9ldmVudHMvZmFibGUtNS1wb3dlci11c2VyLWNhbXA= )вЂ‹
вЂ‹Friday, June 12
12вЂ“2 p.m. ET
Live on Zoom

-->Upgrade to join ( https://0ab9ee3d.click.kit-mail3.com/0vu5mv645et9h96eepqflhv7ooo9wcnh5ngmn/p8heh9h40qzn46iqh3/aHR0cHM6Ly9ldmVyeS50by9zdWJzY3JpYmU= )
Upgrade to join ( https://every.to/subscribe )вЂ‹Dan ShipperвЂ‹, вЂ‹Kieran KlaassenвЂ‹, вЂ‹Katie ParrottвЂ‹, вЂ‹Austin TedescoвЂ‹, and вЂ‹Nityesh AgarwalвЂ‹ will walk through:

* The projects Fable completed from start to finish
* How we use it for coding, growth, research, and writing
* The prompts, context, and review loops behind the results
* When we reach for Fable versus Codex

The camp, recording, and our full Vibe Check are included with a paid Every subscription. Paid subscribers also will get access to our dedicated Codex Power User Camp ( https://0ab9ee3d.click.kit-mail3.com/0vu5mv645et9h96eepqflhv7ooo9wcnh5ngmn/6qheh8hlg97mlgiohk/aHR0cHM6Ly9ldmVyeS50by9ldmVudHMvY29kZXgtcG93ZXItdXNlci1jYW1w ) on Friday, June 26.

-->Save your seat ( https://0ab9ee3d.click.kit-mail3.com/0vu5mv645et9h96eepqflhv7ooo9wcnh5ngmn/p8heh9h40qzn46iqh3/aHR0cHM6Ly9ldmVyeS50by9zdWJzY3JpYmU= )
Save your seat ( https://every.to/subscribe )See you Friday,
The Every team
